docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, HOGAN
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNG, HOGAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, HOGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 13, 2007 BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNG, HOGAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00, DEFENDANT MAY SATISFY JUDGMENT BY EXECUTING NECESSARY DOCUMENTS TO RELEASE THE SUBJECT VEHICLE TO THE PLAINTIFF WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
